Title: Global BI & Analytics Internship
Description:
GLOBAL BI & ANALYTICS INTERNSHIP

AMSTERDAM, COTY HQ

About Coty

At Coty, we are seeking motivated Global BI & Analytics Interns to join our team as part of Coty’s Data Talent Factory, a structured 6-month rotation program designed for students eager to build hands-on skills in data, analytics, and generative AI. You’ll spend your first 2 months training with the Global BI team at our HQ in Amsterdam-Zuid, then rotate through 2 business analytics teams (2 months each), applying your skills to real projects across the organization.

We’re Coty, one of the world’s largest beauty companies with an iconic portfolio of brands across fragrance, color cosmetics, and skin and body care. Coty is the global leader in fragrance and number three in color cosmetics. Coty’s products are sold in over 150 countries around the world. Coty and its brands are committed to a range of social causes as well as seeking to minimize its impact on the environment.

About The Business Facing BI Team In Amsterdam

The Business Facing BI team plays a pivotal role in implementing a variety of business intelligence and data analytics solutions to enable data-driven decision-making globally. We actively set and refine Power BI guidelines to ensure scalable, secure, and innovative BI practices across Coty. Although our team is small, we are diverse with members based in Amsterdam and New York City. We embrace continuous learning and rapid adoption of cutting-edge technologies. We are actively exploring how generative AI is reshaping the way we build and deliver analytics. As an intern, you’ll be part of that journey.

What We Offer

At Coty, we offer an exceptional opportunity for our Global BI & Analytics interns to gain hands-on experience in a vibrant and dynamic environment.


Months 1-2: Training in Power BI and Databricks fundamentals, with a focus on Coty’s standards and best practices. Includes exploration of generative AI capabilities within these platforms.
Months 3-4: First project rotation with a business analytics team.
Months 5-6: Second project rotation with a different business analytics team.
By the end of the program, you’ll have a portfolio of real deliverables, cross-functional exposure, and a strong foundation for a career in data & analytics. You will receive direct mentorship from the Business Facing Power BI Manager, fostering both personal and professional growth. Additionally, you’ll benefit from an inclusive, supportive work environment that encourages collaboration and innovation.


Read a testimonial from a former intern about their time with the Global BI & Analytics team:

“My internship with the Global BI & Analytics team was truly unique. It went far beyond dashboards and data, offering a deep dive into strategy, stakeholder management, and the complexities behind scalable BI products. I was exposed to projects across finance, HR, and transformation teams, which helped me understand the company better while building a strong foundation that supports my current role as a Supply Finance Analyst.” – Esmat Fayaz, Supply Finance Analyst

ARE YOU A COTY FIT


Student (Bachelor/Master), it is important that you remain enrolled with your university.
Demonstrated passion for data and an interest in specializing in Power BI and Databricks.
Strong analytical skills and proficiency with numbers.
Familiarity with data analysis tools such as Excel, Python, SQL, and R is highly advantageous.
Strong interest in generative AI and its practical applications in data & analytics.
Adaptability and willingness to work across different teams and business domains.
Keen eye for detail to ensure high-quality, aesthetically pleasing outputs.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English.


Our Benefits


Great opportunities to work across multiple analytics teams and manage end-to-end projects.
Internship allowance, NS business card (if you were not eligible for a student public transport card), staff discount of Coty products, access to Coty Academy.
Convenient office location (near Amsterdam Zuid station) with lots of fun in-house events.
First-hand knowledge about the beauty industry.


Period

This internship is full-time (40 hours per week), for a duration of 5-6 months and starts from Summer 2026. Remote working is possible up to 50% of your time, in alignment with your line manager. You will receive an internship allowance and NS Business Card if you do not have a student public transport card. The internship can be combined with a thesis but be aware that this will largely have to be done in your own time.

INTERESTED?

At Coty, we believe in equality and inclusion for all, and stand together with those fighting for freedom, justice, and equal rights regardless of who you are or who you love.

Our people make us who we are. They are the brightest minds bringing the boldest ideas to life every day. If you’re the kind of person who refuses to settle, if you want to think bigger, learn faster and go further than you ever thought possible – we’d love to hear from you.

Please send us your motivation letter together with your CV, stating your availability and for how long.

Title: Data Analist / BI Specialist
HTML:
Als Data Analist / BI Specialist zorg jij ervoor dat organisaties hun data omzetten in waardevolle inzichten. Je analyseert complexe datasets, vertaalt deze naar heldere rapportages en dashboards en adviseert stakeholders over datagedreven beslissingen. Met moderne BI-tools zoals Power BI, Tableau of Qlik maak je informatie toegankelijk en begrijpelijk. Daarmee help je onze klanten – zoals de Belastingdienst, Gemeente Den Haag, Centraal Justitieel Incassobureau en VGZ – om hun beleid en processen te verbeteren en toekomstgericht te sturen.


Waarom past deze vacature bij jou?

Je hebt een passie voor data en ziet het als jouw missie om cijfers en informatie te vertalen naar verhalen die impact maken. Je bent analytisch sterk, communicatief vaardig en kunt schakelen tussen business en techniek. Je vindt het leuk om samen te werken met collega’s en stakeholders en voelt je thuis in een omgeving waar data centraal staat.


Wat kan je van ons verwachten?

Bij CIMSOLUTIONS krijg je de kans om te werken aan uitdagende en innovatieve data- en BI-projecten bij toonaangevende organisaties. Wij investeren in jouw ontwikkeling en bieden naast een inspirerende werkomgeving:

  • Een vast dienstverband voor onbepaalde tijd, een max. salaris van € 6.000, bonusregeling, leaseauto, pensioenregeling en maandelijkse onkostenvergoeding;
  • Opdrachtkeuzevrijheid: Jij bepaalt in overleg waar je aan werkt, met de begeleiding van een personal coach;
  • Per jaar € 5.000,- opleidingsbudget en daarnaast ook nog eens 5-10 dagen studietijd;
  • Kennissessies met vakgenoten en inhoudelijke events;
  • Minimaal 25 vakantiedagen, met de mogelijkheid om extra dagen op te bouwen of te verkopen;
  • Sociale events zoals sportdagen, weekend weg en gezellige borrels;
  • Een vestiging bij jou in de buurt.


Persoonlijke ontwikkeling

Bij CIMSOLUTIONS geloven we dat leren de sleutel is tot succes. Learn, create and make it work is niet alleen onze slogan, maar zit in ons DNA. Daarom investeren we continu in jouw groei. Je krijgt de ruimte om jezelf te ontwikkelen tot bijvoorbeeld Senior Data Analist, BI Architect of Data Platform Specialist. Je wordt begeleid door ervaren collega’s, krijgt toegang tot kennisplatforms en blijft altijd scherp op de nieuwste ontwikkelingen binnen jouw vakgebied.


CIMSOLUTIONS heeft een actief diversiteitsbeleid en streeft naar een evenwichtige verdeling van professionals naar onder andere leeftijd, gender, etnische achtergrond en cultuur, arbeidsvermogen, kennis en competenties. Daarbij benadrukken wij dat gelijke kansen voor iedereen een belangrijk uitgangspunt zijn in onze selectie.


Wat breng jij mee?

  • Afgeronde hbo- of wo-opleiding in Bedrijfskunde, Econometrie, Data Science, Business Intelligence of vergelijkbaar;
  • Minimaal 4 jaar ervaring als Data Analist of BI Specialist;
  • Ervaring met BI-tools zoals Power BI, Tableau of Qlik;
  • Sterke kennis van SQL en ervaring met het analyseren van grote datasets;
  • Affiniteit met datavisualisatie, datakwaliteit en rapportage;
  • AI-affiniteit is een pré;
  • Goede beheersing van de Nederlandse en Engelse taal.


Waarom CIMSOLUTIONS?

  • 15 keer Top Employer!
  • Uitstekend salaris;
  • Vrije keuze leaseauto;
  • € 5000,- opleidingsbudget;
  • Aantrekkelijke bonussen;
  • Veel sociale evenementen;
  • Uitdagende projecten;
  • Gevarieerde opdrachten;
  • Gerenommeerde klanten.


Heb je interesse?

Wij vinden het leuk om op ons hoofdkantoor of één van onze lokale vestigingen of online kennis te maken. Solliciteer via onderstaande button of neem voor meer informatie contact op met ons recruitment team via:

  • Mail: recruitment@cimsolutions.nl;
  • Telefoon: 0499-366 000;
  • of bezoek onze website: www.cimsolutions.nl/werken-bij/

Title: Marketing Data Analyst
Description:
Data Analyst, Marketing

Amsterdam, hybrid working,

up to 5,000 per month plus benefits




This role offers the chance to sit close to commercial decision making and see your analysis directly influence marketing strategy. You will work across the customer journey, helping teams move towards a more customer centric and data driven way of working while operating in a supportive, modern data environment.




The Company

They are a well established organisation with a strong consumer focus and a growing ambition around data and analytics. The business combines long term stability with increasing investment in modern data capabilities. Marketing and commercial teams are actively engaged in using data to improve performance, customer experience, and decision making.




The Role

Analyse marketing and customer data to uncover actionable insights.
Build and maintain dashboards and reports to support marketing performance tracking.
Partner with marketing stakeholders to support evidence based commercial decisions.
Translate complex data into clear, compelling stories for non technical audiences.
Contribute to improving data literacy and analytical maturity across the business.




Your Skills and Experience

Hands on experience in data analysis within a commercial or marketing context.
Strong SQL and Python capability for data extraction, analysis, and exploration.
Experience building dashboards using tools such as Power BI or Tableau.
Confident communicator with strong stakeholder engagement and storytelling skills.
Comfortable working with imperfect or evolving data and still delivering value.




What They Offer

One year fixed term contract with exposure across the full customer journey.
Hybrid working model based in Amsterdam.
Clear line of sight between your work and real marketing impact.
The opportunity to grow within a stable organisation with modern data ambitions.




How to Apply

If you are looking for a marketing focused data analyst role with visible business impact, apply now to find out more.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
As Data Analyst, you play a key role in driving data-informed decision-making across one of LYNX’s most strategic product and business domains.

We are looking for four Data Analysts to join one of our core squads: Onboarding, Demand Capture, Client Experience, or Client & Product Integrity.


Onboarding Squad: Analyze and improve the customer onboarding journey to make it faster, smoother, and more efficient.
Demand Capture Squad: Use data to understand customer interest and help turn prospects into qualified leads and customers.
Client Experience Squad: Analyze client behavior, feedback, and platform usage to improve the trading experience, increase loyalty, and reduce churn.
Client and Product Integrity Squad: Support smarter, data-driven compliance and due diligence processes tailored to client needs and risk profiles.


In this role, you will help turn data into actionable insights that improve client journeys, optimize commercial performance, strengthen compliance processes, and support better business decisions.

You will own the full lifecycle of data-driven discovery, from connecting and exploring data to modelling, visualizing, and deploying solutions. Your work will directly influence how we grow, serve, and protect our clients.

What You’ll Do


End-to-End Analytics Ownership: Own the full process of data-driven discovery, from sourcing and exploring data to modelling, dashboarding, and delivering scalable solutions.
Business Problem Solving: Translate complex business challenges into practical, data-based solutions that create measurable impact.
Dashboard & KPI Development: Build dashboards, reporting frameworks, and tracking models that support decision-making and performance management over time.
Stakeholder Partnership: Work closely with Product, Marketing, Operations, Compliance, and Commercial teams to understand priorities and turn questions into insights.
Data Exploration & Insight Generation: Analyze structured and unstructured datasets to identify patterns, risks, opportunities, and growth levers.
Experimentation & Optimization: Support testing, experimentation, and continuous improvement initiatives with strong analytical input.
Data Quality & Governance: Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and reliability across reporting and analytics outputs.
Squad Impact Contribution: Depending on your squad, contribute to improving onboarding flows, lead conversion, client loyalty, churn reduction, or smarter compliance processes.﻿


Who You Are

You are a curious and proactive analyst who enjoys solving business problems with data. You combine technical skills with commercial awareness and communicate insights in a clear and practical way.


You have strong analytical skills and confidence working with structured and unstructured data
You have solid Python and SQL skills, including advanced querying
You have a proactive, self-driven mindset and take ownership of your work
You communicate clearly and can explain complex topics in a simple way
You have a high standard for quality and strong attention to detail
You are comfortable working with cross-functional stakeholders
You are motivated by continuous improvement and measurable impact


Nice to have


Knowledge of financial markets and products such as options and futures
Experience in fintech, brokerage, or other data-rich environments
Experience with BI tools and dashboarding platforms
Experience working in agile product squads


What Do We Offer


A competitive salary
a fixed 13 th month;
8% holiday allowance;
a pension scheme fully paid by LYNX;
public transport travel allowance;
home office equipment and home office allowance;
continuous growth potential, including a personal training budget of € 2,000 per year to invest at your own discretion;
daily lunch from our chef, beverages & fruit, Friday drinks at our own bar;
Multiple trips & activities


Who We Are

“LYNX helps you invest in yourself.”

“Working at LYNX means joining the LYNX family.”

“The development opportunities make LYNX the best place to work.”

This is what employees say about LYNX — and it reflects exactly what we aim to offer: an environment where you can get the best out of yourself.

From our offices in Amsterdam, Ghent, Berlin, and Prague, we work every day to provide private and professional clients with the best trading opportunities through a fast, user-friendly, and reliable platform.

LYNX is an international FinTech company where around 300 colleagues contribute to client success across Europe in an informal, collaborative, and growth-oriented environment.

We're an equal-opportunity employer. We welcome applications from all suitably qualified and eligible candidates without attention to gender identity/expression, age, racial, ethnic and cultural background, religion and beliefs, sexual orientation/identity, disability or neurodiversity.

Title: Business Intelligence Analyst
Description:
Amsterdam | 40 hours




Urban Gym Group is an industry pioneer within the European wellness and fitness community, with over 60 clubs and studios in major cities across the Netherlands and the United Kingdom. You might know us from brands such as Trainmore, ClubSportive, THE CLB, TRIB3, PILAT3S and Gymbox. Our ambitious domestic and international growth plans require an expansion of our Business Intelligence team.




To support this growth, we are currently looking to hire two BI Analysts with different levels of experience:

BI Analyst with 2 - 4 years of experience
BI Analyst with 5+ years of experience.




Depending on your experience, your role will vary in scope, with additional responsibilities around coaching and strategic impact for more experienced candidates.




We are looking for driven BI Analysts to join our team. In this role, you will drive data-driven decision-making across the organisation and, depending on experience, contribute to coaching and developing other analysts, as well as shaping our data strategy and ensuring high-quality insights that directly impact business performance.




Working closely with Finance, Marketing, Operations, and senior leadership, you will extract actionable insights from our data, helping optimise operations, enhance member experiences, and support our ambitious growth plans.

Key responsibilities:




Data & Analytics

Conduct market research and analyses to identify new club locations
Develop business cases for expansion, including new builds, mergers, and acquisitions
Design, build, and maintain robust ETL processes to structure data from various sources
Create data models, views, tables, and reports supporting operational and strategic goals
Develop dashboards and visualisations to enable informed, data-driven decisions
Analyse growth, customer behaviour, and performance to identify opportunities and risks
Query databases to uncover insights related to revenue, member retention, and engagement
Translate data into actionable recommendations to support commercial and strategic decisions




Leadership & Team Management (depending on experience)

Coach and develop Data Analysts
Establish best practices in analytics, reporting, and data governance
Act as a key stakeholder for senior leadership, translating business needs into analytical solutions
Drive continuous improvement within the BI team, including tools, processes, and capabilities




You:

We encourage candidates with different levels of experience to apply. You bring:

2–4 years or 5+ years of experience in a data-focused role (e.g., Data Analyst, BI Analyst, or Analytics Consultant)
Proven experience in data modelling, pipeline creation, and analytics
Advanced proficiency in SQL, with solid experience in Azure SQL environments
Hands-on experience building ETL pipelines, ideally using Python or Azure Synapse Analytics
Experience with Power BI, with a track record of building impactful dashboards
Strong business acumen, ideally within fitness, wellness, retail, or a consumer-focused industry
Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills
Strong problem-solving mindset and attention to detail
Experience in fast-paced, scaling organisations is a plus
Experience coaching or mentoring others is a plus
Located in the Netherlands




To foster collaboration, coaching, and team energy, we expect our colleagues to work on-site (head office or clubs) at least 4 days per week (and up to 5 days depending on the role).

We offer:

A competitive salary plus 8% holiday pay
26 holidays per year (based on full-time employment) and the option to exchange public holidays
Pension plan to support your future
The chance to join our Work in Club program and contribute to charity work once a year
Unlimited access to all our high-end fitness locations for you and a +1
Unlimited access to well-being services for you and your family via OpenUp
An inspiring head office, a short 10-minute walk from Amsterdam Central Station
A diverse and energetic team of 500 colleagues pushing boundaries and supporting one another

  • A diverse and energetic team of 500 colleagues pushing boundaries and supporting one another

Title: Data Analist / BI Specialist
HTML:
Als Data Analist / BI Specialist zorg jij ervoor dat organisaties hun data omzetten in waardevolle inzichten. Je analyseert complexe datasets, vertaalt deze naar heldere rapportages en dashboards en adviseert stakeholders over datagedreven beslissingen. Met moderne BI-tools zoals Power BI, Tableau of Qlik maak je informatie toegankelijk en begrijpelijk. Daarmee help je onze klanten – zoals de Belastingdienst, Gemeente Den Haag, Centraal Justitieel Incassobureau en VGZ – om hun beleid en processen te verbeteren en toekomstgericht te sturen.


Waarom past deze vacature bij jou?

Je hebt een passie voor data en ziet het als jouw missie om cijfers en informatie te vertalen naar verhalen die impact maken. Je bent analytisch sterk, communicatief vaardig en kunt schakelen tussen business en techniek. Je vindt het leuk om samen te werken met collega’s en stakeholders en voelt je thuis in een omgeving waar data centraal staat.


Wat kan je van ons verwachten?

Bij CIMSOLUTIONS krijg je de kans om te werken aan uitdagende en innovatieve data- en BI-projecten bij toonaangevende organisaties. Wij investeren in jouw ontwikkeling en bieden naast een inspirerende werkomgeving:

  • Een vast dienstverband voor onbepaalde tijd, een max. salaris van € 6.000, bonusregeling, leaseauto, pensioenregeling en maandelijkse onkostenvergoeding;
  • Opdrachtkeuzevrijheid: Jij bepaalt in overleg waar je aan werkt, met de begeleiding van een personal coach;
  • Per jaar € 5.000,- opleidingsbudget en daarnaast ook nog eens 5-10 dagen studietijd;
  • Kennissessies met vakgenoten en inhoudelijke events;
  • Minimaal 25 vakantiedagen, met de mogelijkheid om extra dagen op te bouwen of te verkopen;
  • Sociale events zoals sportdagen, weekend weg en gezellige borrels;
  • Een vestiging bij jou in de buurt.


Persoonlijke ontwikkeling

Bij CIMSOLUTIONS geloven we dat leren de sleutel is tot succes. Learn, create and make it work is niet alleen onze slogan, maar zit in ons DNA. Daarom investeren we continu in jouw groei. Je krijgt de ruimte om jezelf te ontwikkelen tot bijvoorbeeld Senior Data Analist, BI Architect of Data Platform Specialist. Je wordt begeleid door ervaren collega’s, krijgt toegang tot kennisplatforms en blijft altijd scherp op de nieuwste ontwikkelingen binnen jouw vakgebied.


CIMSOLUTIONS heeft een actief diversiteitsbeleid en streeft naar een evenwichtige verdeling van professionals naar onder andere leeftijd, gender, etnische achtergrond en cultuur, arbeidsvermogen, kennis en competenties. Daarbij benadrukken wij dat gelijke kansen voor iedereen een belangrijk uitgangspunt zijn in onze selectie.


Wat breng jij mee?

  • Afgeronde hbo- of wo-opleiding in Bedrijfskunde, Econometrie, Data Science, Business Intelligence of vergelijkbaar;
  • Minimaal 4 jaar ervaring als Data Analist of BI Specialist;
  • Ervaring met BI-tools zoals Power BI, Tableau of Qlik;
  • Sterke kennis van SQL en ervaring met het analyseren van grote datasets;
  • Affiniteit met datavisualisatie, datakwaliteit en rapportage;
  • AI-affiniteit is een pré;
  • Goede beheersing van de Nederlandse en Engelse taal.


Waarom CIMSOLUTIONS?

  • 15 keer Top Employer!
  • Uitstekend salaris;
  • Vrije keuze leaseauto;
  • € 5000,- opleidingsbudget;
  • Aantrekkelijke bonussen;
  • Veel sociale evenementen;
  • Uitdagende projecten;
  • Gevarieerde opdrachten;
  • Gerenommeerde klanten.


Heb je interesse?

Wij vinden het leuk om op ons hoofdkantoor of één van onze lokale vestigingen of online kennis te maken. Solliciteer via onderstaande button of neem voor meer informatie contact op met ons recruitment team via:

  • Mail: recruitment@cimsolutions.nl;
  • Telefoon: 0499-366 000;
  • of bezoek onze website: www.cimsolutions.nl/werken-bij/

Title: Senior Data Analyst
Description:
Senior Data Analyst

Amsterdam, Netherlands

Competitive salary and benefits




This is an opportunity to join a high-impact data team at the heart of a large-scale digital platform. You will work on complex, real-world problems that directly influence product direction, commercial strategy, and customer experience. This role offers strong exposure to senior stakeholders and the chance to shape how data drives decision-making across the business.




The Company

They are a leading digital platform operating at scale across a high-traffic consumer marketplace. With millions of monthly users, they enable both individuals and businesses to connect, transact, and grow. Their product spans mobile and web, and they operate in a fast-paced, data-rich environment. Data plays a central role in how they optimise user experience, monetisation, and long-term growth.




The Role

Partner with product, commercial, and marketing stakeholders to define analytical priorities and deliver insights that drive decision-making
Translate ambiguous business questions into structured analysis and actionable outcomes
Build dashboards and reporting that focus on meaningful KPIs across revenue, growth, and customer behaviour
Analyse large-scale datasets to identify trends, risks, and opportunities across the platform
Influence stakeholders at all levels through clear and compelling communication of insights
Support experimentation and measurement strategies to improve product and commercial performance
Collaborate with data and engineering teams to improve tracking, data quality, and metric definitions




Your Skills & Experience




Strong commercial experience in data analysis within a product-led digital environment such as e-commerce or marketplaces
Advanced SQL skills, including working with complex datasets and optimised queries
Hands-on experience with Python for analysis, modelling, or automation
Familiarity with modern cloud data platforms such as BigQuery, Databricks, or AWS
Experience using BI tools such as Tableau to create impactful dashboards
Strong understanding of key business concepts including customer lifecycle, monetisation, and growth metrics
Confident communicator with the ability to influence stakeholders and translate data into business value
Comfortable working in ambiguous environments and proactively identifying opportunities




What They Offer




Competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package
A collaborative, cross-functional working environment
Opportunity to influence business and product strategy at scale
Strong career progression and exposure to senior leadership
Access to modern data tools and technology




How to Apply

If you are a commercially minded Senior Data Analyst looking to make a tangible impact, apply now to find out more.

Title: Data analist
Description:
Over ons

Data Strategie is een snelgroeiend bedrijf dat gespecialiseerd is in gegevensverwerking en -analyse binnen Azure. We werken samen met toonaangevende klanten in verschillende sectoren om waardevolle inzichten te genereren uit grote datasets. Ons team bestaat uit enthousiaste professionals die gepassioneerd zijn over data & analytics.




Functieomschrijving

Als data analist bij Data Strategie werk je nauw samen met ons ervaren engineeringteam om data te visualiseren en af te stemmen met de business. Daarnaast houd je bezig met data verbeter trajecten.




Verantwoordelijkheden

Ontwerpen en implementeren van dashboards
Werken met databases en big data-technologieën zoals Hadoop en Spark.
Samenwerken met de business om de gegevensbehoeften te begrijpen en oplossingen te bieden.
Data kwaliteit verbeteren
Documenteren van technische specificaties en processen.







Vereisten

HBO/WO student
Ervaring met Excel
Analytisch denkvermogen en probleemoplossende vaardigheden.
Goede communicatievaardigheden in het Nederlands en Engels.







Aanbod

Salarisschaal 3500€ - 4500€
Mogelijkheid tot persoonlijke groei en ontwikkeling
Werken in een dynamische en innovatieve omgeving
Flexibele werktijden en de mogelijkheid tot gedeeltelijk thuiswerken
Leasebudget
Optie om vast in dienst te komen







Solliciteren

Ben jij enthousiast over de vacature en wil je deel uitmaken van ons team? Stuur dan je cv en motivatiebrief naar nasser@data-strategie.com We kijken ernaar uit om van je te horen!

Veel succes met je sollicitatie!

Title: Data-Analist
Description:
Bij ista Nederland bevinden we ons midden in een fundamentele transformatie. De komende jaren zetten we grote stappen in digitalisering, datagedreven werken en de verdere professionalisering van onze organisatie. Data speelt hierin een steeds belangrijkere rol.




Binnen het team Business Insights werken we eraan om data toegankelijker, begrijpelijker en relevanter te maken voor de hele organisatie. Om deze ontwikkeling te versnellen, zoeken wij een Data-Analist die data weet te vertalen naar concrete inzichten en hiermee bijdraagt aan betere besluitvorming binnen het Management Team en de organisatie.




In deze rol werk je samen met een klein en ervaren team, waarin je de ruimte krijgt om te leren, impact te maken en actief bij te dragen aan de verdere ontwikkeling van data binnen ista.




Dit ga je doen

Als Data-Analist vertaal je data naar stuurinformatie en draag je bij aan de verdere datagedreven ontwikkeling van ista.




Business analyse & data (Power BI)

Ontwikkel en onderhoud je dashboards en rapportages (voornamelijk in Power BI).
Je bouwt mee aan ETL-processen en de doorontwikkeling van het datawarehouse.
Vertaal je businessvragen van verschillende afdelingen naar concrete data-inzichten en rapportages.
Analyseer je data en formuleer je heldere conclusies en aanbevelingen.
Lever je proactief inzichten die bijdragen aan besluitvorming binnen het MT.
Ondersteun je de transformatie van ista-processen door het leveren van relevante business insights.




Inzichten & organisatiebrede ondersteuning

Voer je analyses uit op het gebied van bijvoorbeeld marktontwikkeling, concurrentie, financiën en HR.
Signaleer je trends en verbeterkansen op basis van data.
Automatiseer en optimaliseer je rapportages die nu nog handmatig worden uitgevoerd.
Draag je bij aan het toegankelijk maken van data binnen de organisatie.




PMO-ondersteuning & procesverbetering

Ondersteun je projecten en transformatietrajecten met data en voortgangsinzichten.
Werk je samen met verschillende afdelingen bij planning en voortgangsbewaking.
Help je bij het implementeren en borgen van verbeterinitiatieven binnen processen.




Dit kun je van ons verwachten

Werken bij een organisatie die volop digitaliseert, groeit en professionaliseert.




ista biedt jou:

Een rol waarin je direct impact hebt op besluitvorming en strategie.
Een aantrekkelijk salaris, het ista Keuze Budget en een vaste 13e maand.
De mogelijkheid om je verder te ontwikkelen in data-analyse, Power BI en business insights.
Samenwerking met een ervaren team waarin je veel kunt leren.
Een omgeving waarin data, technologie en duurzaamheid samenkomen.
Een informele werksfeer met korte lijnen en betrokken collega’s.
Faciliteiten voor hybride werken.




Hier herken jij jezelf in

Je beschikt over een minimaal afgeronde HBO opleiding, bijvoorbeeld in Business Administration, Data, Finance of vergelijkbaar.
Je hebt minimaal 2 jaar ervaring met data-analyse en procesoptimalisatie.
Je hebt affiniteit met data, dashboards en het genereren van inzichten.
Je hebt bij voorkeur ervaring met Power BI of vergelijkbare analysetools.
Je bent analytisch sterk en weet data te vertalen naar begrijpelijke conclusies.
Je stelt de juiste vragen om behoeften en achterliggende vraagstukken scherp te krijgen.
Je communiceert helder en weet inzichten overtuigend over te brengen op verschillende niveaus.
Je creëert draagvlak voor jouw analyses en weet om te gaan met weerstand.
Je werkt proactief en draagt bij aan verbetering en structuur binnen processen.
Je beheerst de Nederlandse en Engelse taal goed.
Je hebt interesse in of staat open voor het gebruik van AI en nieuwe technologieën om efficiënter te werken.







Over ista Nederland B.V.

Wij geven gebouwen een toekomst. Dat doen we met producten en diensten die helpen de CO₂-uitstoot van gebouwen te verminderen. We beheren gegevens en processen die ervoor zorgen dat vastgoed duurzamer, efficiënter, veiliger en comfortabeler wordt.




Onze oplossingen zijn digitaal en ondersteunen vastgoedeigenaren, beheerders en bewoners bij de overstap naar duurzame en toekomstbestendige technologieën. Daarbij staat gebruiksgemak centraal: we maken duurzame keuzes toegankelijk en eenvoudig, zodat iedereen kan bijdragen aan de bescherming van het klimaat.




Wereldwijd hebben we meer dan 48 miljoen draadloze apparaten in gebruik en werken ruim 6.600 medewerkers in 21 landen aan energie-efficiënte gebouwen. Onze producten en diensten worden toegepast in meer dan 14 miljoen woningen en commerciële gebouwen bij ruim 470.000 klanten. In 2025 realiseerde de ista Group een omzet van € 1.287 miljoen.

Title: Data Analyst - Entry Level
Description:
At TCC Global, we create innovative loyalty marketing solutions that drive customer engagement and strengthen brand loyalty for some of the world’s leading retailers. Our passionate team delivers exceptional results through precision execution, strong client partnerships, and seamless operational processes.

As a Data Analyst within the Data & Analytics (D&A) department, you will sit in TCC’s client- and stakeholder-facing BI team. You will play a central role in proving TCC’s value proposition by measuring loyalty campaign ROI, analyzing the drivers of campaign performance, and translating findings into clear proof points and business insights that inform commercial and operational decisions. The role carries hands-on tasks across measurement, analysis, data pipeline building, and report development. You will partner with Marketing, Sales, and Operations to deliver insights, scale campaign measurement, support commercial proposals, and optimize campaign execution through in-store and digital channels. Working day-to-day with Power BI, Azure ML, and AI tooling, you will help shift the business toward democratized, AI-served insights — delivered faster, embedded with stakeholders, and closer to the decisions they support.

The role supports the BI function within the Data & Analytics department, with the following responsibilities:


Measure and analyze campaign performance and ROI; translate results into proof points that demonstrate TCC’s value proposition, in close collaboration with Marketing.
Deliver business analyses that support commercial proposals, client conversations, and internal de-cision-making across Commercial, Delivery, and Operations.
Respond to ad-hoc analysis requests from across the business — turning open-ended questions into structured analyses with clear, timely answers.
Build and maintain Power BI reports and dashboards.
Develop and optimize data pipelines on TCC’s data platform (Azure).
Contribute to the evolution of analytical and AI-served tools (including Enterprise AI / text2sql) that put insights directly in the hands of colleagues and clients.
Use AI-assisted tooling to accelerate analysis, pipeline, and reporting work.
Support running solutions — monitor pipelines and reports in production, investigate issues, and contribute to iterative improvement.
Apply data governance standards in day-to-day work, ensuring trusted, well-documented outputs.
Participate in agile delivery ceremonies (planning, stand-ups, reviews, retrospectives) and share best practices across the team.



Must‑haves: 


1–2 years of experience in a Data Analyst, BI Analyst, or similar role, with hands-on experience in performance/campaign analysis and dashboard development;
Strong analytical and technical skills across SQL, Python, statistics, Power BI (including DAX/data modelling), and cloud-based data environments (preferably Azure);
Ability to turn complex data into actionable business insights and communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical stakeholders;
Comfortable working in agile, fast-paced environments, collaborating cross-functionally, and using AI-assisted tools to improve analysis and reporting workflows;
Fluent English.



Nice‑to‑haves:


Exposure to Azure AI Foundry and broader modern AI/data platforms;
Experience in retail, loyalty, marketing, or campaign analytics;
Additional language skills such as Dutch, Spanish, Portuguese, or German;
Strong curiosity for emerging AI tooling and continuous learning across the data and AI stack;
Practical experience with data pipelines, ELT/ETL processes, testing/data quality practices, and software engineering fundamentals such as Git and code reviews.



What we offer:


Competitive salary and annual bonus.
Opportunities for growth and professional development.
A dynamic and supportive work environment where your ideas truly matter.
Hybrid working model.



TCC is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All applicants will be considered without distinction of age, culture, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, ethnicity, or disability status.

Title: Senior Data Analyst
Description:
About Nebius:

Nebius is leading a new era in cloud infrastructure for the global AI economy. We are building a full-stack AI cloud platform that supports developers and enterprises from data and model training through to production deployment, without the cost and complexity of building large in-house AI/ML infrastructure.

Built by engineers, for engineers. From large-scale GPU orchestration to inference optimization, we own the hard problems across compute, storage, networking and applied AI.

Listed on Nasdaq (NBIS) and headquartered in Amsterdam, we have a global footprint with R&D hubs across Europe, the UK, North America and Israel. Our team of 1,500+ includes hundreds of engineers with deep expertise across hardware, software and AI R&D.




The role

Nebius is looking for a Senior Data Analyst who will act as a trusted analytical partner to business and product stakeholders. You will work end-to-end: from shaping raw data into reliable datasets, to creating dashboards stakeholders trust, to running deeper analyses that clarify what’s happening, why it’s happening, and what to do next.




This role requires strong technical foundations, but also mature business judgment. You will be expected to understand business context, structure ambiguous problems, challenge assumptions constructively, and turn analysis into practical recommendations. You should be comfortable working with incomplete information, changing priorities, and complex stakeholder needs — bringing clarity where things are messy. You will also contribute to developing AI-assisted analytics tools that reduce manual reporting, support better decision-making, and surface anomalies early.




You’re welcome to work in our office in Amsterdam




Your responsibilities will include:

Dashboard development- Design, implement, document, and maintain interactive dashboards used by business stakeholders. Improve existing dashboards by optimizing usability, performance, and metric definitions. Ensure dashboards are reliable, actionable, and aligned with business priorities.
Data engineering support- Contribute to ETL/ELT processes and data modeling: validate sources, monitor data freshness, improve data quality checks, and troubleshoot pipeline issues with clear root-cause writeups.
AI-driven analytics- Help design, test, and refine analytical AI agents that streamline reporting, standardize repetitive analysis, and proactively flag anomalies. Participate in evaluation, including quality checks and false positives/negatives, and iterate based on feedback.
Exploratory and ad-hoc analysis- Translate business questions into structured analysis plans, apply appropriate statistical methods, and communicate findings clearly, including assumptions, limitations, and recommended actions. Turn recurring ad-hoc requests into reusable assets where possible.
Stakeholder collaboration- Clarify requirements, align on definitions, KPIs and metrics, and present results in a way that supports decisions — not just “interesting numbers”. Build trusted relationships with stakeholders and help them interpret data in the context of business trade-offs.
Problem structuring and decision support- Work through ambiguous or poorly defined problems, break them down into manageable analytical questions, and help stakeholders make decisions despite uncertainty.
Analytical best practices- Help raise the quality of analytics work by improving documentation, reviewing metric definitions, sharing best practices, and supporting less experienced colleagues where relevant.




We expect you to have:

Significant experience as a Data Analyst, Senior Data Analyst, Business Analyst, Product Analyst, or in a similar analyticalrole.
Strong proficiency in Python and SQL, and confidence using Excel when it is the most efficient tool.
Solid grounding in statistics and analytical thinking, including descriptive statistics, hypothesis testing, and regression fundamentals.
Experience producing clear data visualizations and communicating analytical findings in plain language.
Strong attention to data quality and detail, including validating definitions, identifying inconsistencies, and implementing data checks.
Demonstrated ability to translate business questions into structured analysis and actionable insights.
Solid business acumen, including the ability to understand business drivers, connect analysis to commercial or operational impact, and prioritize analytical work based on value.
Strong problem-solving skills, with the ability to break down complex or unclear questions, form hypotheses, test assumptions, and identify practical next steps.
Comfort with uncertainty and ambiguity, including the ability to move work forward when requirements are incomplete, data is imperfect, or priorities shift.
Strong written and verbal communication skills, including explaining technical concepts to non-technical audiences.
Strong stakeholder management skills, including the ability to clarify needs, challenge assumptions constructively, and align stakeholders around definitions and conclusions.
Working knowledge of spoken and written English.




It will be an added bonus if you have:

Experience with BI tools such as Tableau, Power BI, Looker, or Superset.
Familiarity with modern data stacks such as dbt, Airflow, BigQuery, Snowflake, or PostgreSQL.
Experience with experiment analysis, cohort analysis, or funnel metrics.
Experience working in cloud infrastructure, AI/ML, SaaS, developer tools, or another technical product environment.
Experience mentoring other analysts or contributing to analytics standards, documentation, and best practices.




Benefits & Perks:

Competitive compensation
Career growth and learning opportunities
Flexibility and work-life balance
Collaborative and innovative culture
Opportunity to work on impactful AI projects
International environment and talented teams




What's it like to work at Nebius:

Fast moving - Bold thinking - Constant growth - Meaningful impact - Trust and real ownership - Opportunity to shape the future of AI




Equal Opportunity Statement:

Nebius is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse workplace and to providing equal employment opportunities in all aspects of employment. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy), national origin, ancestry, age, disability, genetic information, marital status, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.




Applicants must be authorized to work in the country in which they apply and will be required to provide proof of employment eligibility as a condition of hire.




If you need accommodations during the application process, please let us know.

Title: Data Analyst, Senior
Description:
This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Data Analyst, Senior based in Netherlands.

As a Senior Data Analyst, you will play a central role in delivering and optimizing global digital solutions within the Health, Safety & Environment and Risk Management domains. Operating in a highly collaborative and international environment, you will transform complex datasets into actionable insights that support strategic decision-making for global clients. You will contribute to the implementation of scalable digital products, drive process automation, and ensure data-driven excellence across multiple projects. This role combines technical expertise, consulting exposure, and strong stakeholder interaction, offering the opportunity to work on impactful initiatives with real-world business value. You will engage closely with cross-functional teams and clients, ensuring successful solution delivery, adoption, and continuous improvement in a fast-paced, innovation-driven environment.

Accountabilities


Manage and support the implementation of global digital products and solutions, ensuring successful deployment, adoption, and ongoing optimization.
Analyze complex datasets and deliver high-quality insights through data storytelling, reporting, and visualization tools.
Identify opportunities for automation, process standardization, and efficiency improvements using AI and advanced analytics.
Collaborate with distributed, cross-functional teams to ensure effective project delivery and alignment with client requirements.
Develop and maintain documentation, reports, dashboards, and executive presentations using tools such as PowerPoint and BI platforms.
Configure and support product deployments, including delivering training sessions to internal teams and clients.
Work directly with customers to ensure best practices in product usage, implementation, and data interpretation.
Leverage AI tools and advanced technologies to enhance multilingual configuration, analysis, and delivery support.
Conduct unit testing and quality assurance activities to ensure the reliability and performance of delivered solutions.
Contribute to agile squads, participate in ceremonies, and support continuous improvement initiatives across projects.


Requirements


Minimum 6 years of professional experience in data-focused roles, ideally within consulting or technology environments.
At least 3 years of experience working in consulting organizations or client-facing project delivery roles.
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.
Strong proficiency in SQL and experience with database technologies such as Databricks and MongoDB.
Advanced experience with Business Intelligence tools such as Power BI, Tableau, or equivalent visualization platforms.
Strong command of Excel, PowerPoint, Power Query, and Jira for analysis, reporting, and project management.
Understanding of ETL processes and basic familiarity with machine learning concepts.
Ability to write and use AI prompts to support and optimize analytical and operational tasks.
Experience in unit testing, QA processes, and data validation activities.
Strong analytical thinking with excellent attention to detail and data storytelling capabilities.
Excellent communication skills with the ability to translate technical insights into business value.
Strong teamwork, adaptability, and problem-solving mindset in fast-paced environments.
Fluent professional English is required; additional European language skills are a plus.
Degree in a relevant technical or analytical field is required.


Benefits


Competitive compensation package (details adapted to location and experience).
Fully remote position within Europe with flexible working arrangements.
Long-term international project exposure with global clients and teams.
Opportunity to work on impactful digital transformation initiatives in sustainability and risk management.
Strong focus on career development, learning, and continuous upskilling.
Exposure to advanced technologies including AI, data platforms, and automation tools.
Collaborative and multicultural work environment with distributed teams.
Participation in agile squads and innovative delivery frameworks.
Access to complex, large-scale projects with real-world business impact.
Opportunities to grow within consulting, data, or leadership career paths.


How Jobgether Works

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

Why Apply Through Jobgether?

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Title: Medior Data Analist
Description:
Ben jij een Medior Data Analist die energie krijgt van het analyseren van data en het vertalen van cijfers naar concrete inzichten? Deze organisatie biedt jou de kans om een essentiële rol te spelen binnen Portfolio Management, waar je samenwerkt met collega's, stakeholders en volmachtgevers om betrouwbare rapportages en waardevolle inzichten te leveren. Je combineert analytisch vermogen met een scherp oog voor kwaliteit, processen en verbetering. Hier krijg je volop ruimte om initiatief te nemen, jezelf te ontwikkelen via opleidingen en cursussen, en mee te bouwen aan slimmere processen en sterkere inzichten. De informele sfeer, korte lijnen en behulpzame collega's zorgen ervoor dat je snel kunt schakelen en impact kunt maken. Bovendien kun je deels vanuit huis werken, sport je onder werktijd met collega's, ontvang je een laptop en telefoon van de zaak en geniet je van een gezellig High Performance team!

Omschrijving

Wat je gaat doen:

Als Medior Data Analist ben jij verantwoordelijk voor het vertalen van informatievragen naar heldere analyses die direct bijdragen aan betere besluitvorming binnen Portfolio Management. Je analyseert dagelijks verzekeringstechnische data om trends, ontwikkelingen en afwijkingen inzichtelijk te maken. Door intensief gebruik te maken van Excel en FrameStory stel je rapportages op die zowel interne als externe stakeholders voorzien van betrouwbare informatie. Je stemt regelmatig af met verschillende afdelingen zoals Underwriting en Claims om processen te optimaliseren. Daarnaast lever je verzekeringstechnische rapportages aan volmachtgevers, denk je mee over procesverbeteringen, verbeter je datakwaliteit binnen FrameStory én zorg je ervoor dat complexe informatie begrijpelijk wordt gemaakt voor de business. Samenwerken in een team waar kennisdeling centraal staat is hierbij essentieel.

Je vertaalt informatievragen naar duidelijke analyses en rapportages waarmee collega's echt verder kunnen.
Je werkt dagelijks met verzekeringstechnische data om trends, ontwikkelingen en afwijkingen inzichtelijk te maken voor de business.
Je gebruikt Excel en FrameStory intensief om data te analyseren en rapportages op te stellen die stakeholders ondersteunen bij besluitvorming.
Je zorgt voor correcte en tijdige informatieverstrekking richting interne afdelingen zoals Underwriting en Claims én externe stakeholders.
Je levert verzekeringstechnische rapportages aan volmachtgevers zodat zij beschikken over actuele inzichten.
Je stemt af met verschillende afdelingen binnen de organisatie om processen te optimaliseren en efficiënter te laten verlopen.
Je denkt actief mee over procesverbeteringen en draagt bij aan het verbeteren van datakwaliteit
Je maakt complexe informatie begrijpelijk en bruikbaar voor de business door deze helder uit te leggen aan collega's.
Je werkt samen in een dynamisch team waar inhoudelijke sparring centraal staat en waar kennisdeling wordt gestimuleerd.

Wat je meeneemt:

Jouw analytisch vermogen stelt jou in staat om complexe data-vraagstukken snel te doorgronden en deze om te zetten naar concrete inzichten die collega's verder helpen. Met jouw afgeronde wo-opleiding in bijvoorbeeld wiskunde of bedrijfseconomie beschik jij over de juiste theoretische achtergrond om diepgaande analyses uit te voeren. Minimaal één jaar ervaring in een vergelijkbare functie zorgt ervoor dat jij gewend bent om zelfstandig én gestructureerd te werken. Je bent communicatief vaardig waardoor jij ingewikkelde materie helder weet uit te leggen aan collega's uit verschillende disciplines. Jouw kennis van MS Office - vooral Excel - maakt dat jij efficiënt data kunt verwerken. Je vindt het prettig om samen te werken met anderen; inhoudelijk sparren met collega's geeft jou energie. Daarnaast ben jij stressbestendig: ook wanneer er veel tegelijk speelt weet jij het overzicht te bewaren. Affiniteit of ervaring binnen de verzekeringsbranche is mooi meegenomen maar geen must; jouw leergierigheid zorgt ervoor dat jij snel nieuwe kennis oppikt.

Je hebt een afgeronde wo-opleiding waardoor je beschikt over sterke analytische vaardigheden.
Je hebt minimaal één jaar ervaring in een vergelijkbare analytische functie waardoor je gewend bent om complexe vraagstukken uit te zoeken.
Je hebt goede kennis van MS Office, met name Excel waarmee je data efficiënt kunt analyseren.
Je werkt zelfstandig en gestructureerd zodat je overzicht houdt in uiteenlopende werkzaamheden.
Je bent communicatief sterk waardoor je complexe informatie helder kunt uitleggen aan collega's uit verschillende afdelingen.
Je vindt het leuk om inhoudelijk te sparren met collega's wat bijdraagt aan gezamenlijke oplossingen.
Je beheerst Nederlands én Engels uitstekend zowel mondeling als schriftelijk zodat je effectief kunt communiceren met diverse stakeholders.
Je bent stressbestendig waardoor je makkelijk schakelt tussen verschillende werkzaamheden zonder het overzicht te verliezen.
Ervaring binnen de verzekeringsbranche is een pré maar geen vereiste; affiniteit met deze sector helpt wel bij het begrijpen van de context.

Wat onderscheidt dit bedrijf:

Deze organisatie verzekert complexe risico's voor bedrijven met specialistische kennis. De groei is hard, zowel nationaal als internationaal, waarbij continu wordt gebouwd aan slimmere processen, betere data én sterkere inzichten. Je komt terecht in een omgeving waar jouw inbreng gewaardeerd wordt: hier krijg jij veel ruimte om impact te maken op de verdere groei van de organisatie. De bedrijfscultuur kenmerkt zich door korte lijnen, informele sfeer én collegialiteit; goede ideeën verdwijnen niet in een la maar krijgen daadwerkelijk aandacht. Collega's helpen elkaar graag verder waardoor jij altijd kunt rekenen op support bij inhoudelijke vraagstukken of procesverbeteringen. Initiatief nemen wordt gestimuleerd: jouw bijdrage aan slimmere processen of betere rapportages wordt gezien én gewaardeerd. Naast inhoudelijke uitdaging biedt deze werkgever uitstekende arbeidsvoorwaarden. De locatie is in hartje Rotterdam.

Wat is het volgende:

Ben jij enthousiast geworden over deze rol als Medior Data Analist? Grijp dan nu jouw kans om impact te maken binnen Portfolio Management!




This role is managed by Walters People B.V., trading under the name Robert Walters.

HTML:
Ben jij een Medior Data Analist die energie krijgt van het analyseren van data en het vertalen van cijfers naar concrete inzichten? Deze organisatie biedt jou de kans om een essentiële rol te spelen binnen Portfolio Management, waar je samenwerkt met collega's, stakeholders en volmachtgevers om betrouwbare rapportages en waardevolle inzichten te leveren. Je combineert analytisch vermogen met een scherp oog voor kwaliteit, processen en verbetering. Hier krijg je volop ruimte om initiatief te nemen, jezelf te ontwikkelen via opleidingen en cursussen, en mee te bouwen aan slimmere processen en sterkere inzichten. De informele sfeer, korte lijnen en behulpzame collega's zorgen ervoor dat je snel kunt schakelen en impact kunt maken. Bovendien kun je deels vanuit huis werken, sport je onder werktijd met collega's, ontvang je een laptop en telefoon van de zaak en geniet je van een gezellig High Performance team!

Omschrijving

Wat je gaat doen:

Als Medior Data Analist ben jij verantwoordelijk voor het vertalen van informatievragen naar heldere analyses die direct bijdragen aan betere besluitvorming binnen Portfolio Management. Je analyseert dagelijks verzekeringstechnische data om trends, ontwikkelingen en afwijkingen inzichtelijk te maken. Door intensief gebruik te maken van Excel en FrameStory stel je rapportages op die zowel interne als externe stakeholders voorzien van betrouwbare informatie. Je stemt regelmatig af met verschillende afdelingen zoals Underwriting en Claims om processen te optimaliseren. Daarnaast lever je verzekeringstechnische rapportages aan volmachtgevers, denk je mee over procesverbeteringen, verbeter je datakwaliteit binnen FrameStory én zorg je ervoor dat complexe informatie begrijpelijk wordt gemaakt voor de business. Samenwerken in een team waar kennisdeling centraal staat is hierbij essentieel.

  • Je vertaalt informatievragen naar duidelijke analyses en rapportages waarmee collega's echt verder kunnen.
  • Je werkt dagelijks met verzekeringstechnische data om trends, ontwikkelingen en afwijkingen inzichtelijk te maken voor de business.
  • Je gebruikt Excel en FrameStory intensief om data te analyseren en rapportages op te stellen die stakeholders ondersteunen bij besluitvorming.
  • Je zorgt voor correcte en tijdige informatieverstrekking richting interne afdelingen zoals Underwriting en Claims én externe stakeholders.
  • Je levert verzekeringstechnische rapportages aan volmachtgevers zodat zij beschikken over actuele inzichten.
  • Je stemt af met verschillende afdelingen binnen de organisatie om processen te optimaliseren en efficiënter te laten verlopen.
  • Je denkt actief mee over procesverbeteringen en draagt bij aan het verbeteren van datakwaliteit
  • Je maakt complexe informatie begrijpelijk en bruikbaar voor de business door deze helder uit te leggen aan collega's.
  • Je werkt samen in een dynamisch team waar inhoudelijke sparring centraal staat en waar kennisdeling wordt gestimuleerd.

Jouw analytisch vermogen stelt jou in staat om complexe data-vraagstukken snel te doorgronden en deze om te zetten naar concrete inzichten die collega's verder helpen. Met jouw afgeronde wo-opleiding in bijvoorbeeld wiskunde of bedrijfseconomie beschik jij over de juiste theoretische achtergrond om diepgaande analyses uit te voeren. Minimaal één jaar ervaring in een vergelijkbare functie zorgt ervoor dat jij gewend bent om zelfstandig én gestructureerd te werken. Je bent communicatief vaardig waardoor jij ingewikkelde materie helder weet uit te leggen aan collega's uit verschillende disciplines. Title: Senior Data Analyst
Description:
Senior Data Analyst

Amsterdam, Netherlands

Up to 100k annually




This is an opportunity to take on a highly visible Senior Data Analyst role where your insights will directly influence product, commercial strategy, and customer experience at scale. You will work with complex datasets and senior stakeholders, shaping decisions that impact millions of users across a leading digital platform.




The Company

They are a well-established digital platform business operating at significant scale across the Benelux region. With millions of monthly users, they connect consumers and businesses through a marketplace model while supporting sustainable and circular commerce. Their teams are cross-functional, data-driven, and focused on continuous product and commercial innovation. Analytics plays a central role in enabling smarter decisions across the organisation.




The Role

Partner with product, marketing, and commercial teams to translate business challenges into actionable analytical plans
Identify growth opportunities and risks through deep analysis of user behaviour, conversion, and revenue trends
Design and build dashboards that clearly communicate performance and key business metrics
Analyse large, complex datasets to uncover meaningful insights and inform decision-making
Influence stakeholders across all levels through clear storytelling and data-driven recommendations
Support experimentation and measurement frameworks to evaluate product and marketing initiatives
Collaborate with data and engineering teams to improve data quality, tracking, and metric definitions




Your Skills and Experience

Strong commercial experience in data analytics within a digital, product-led, or marketplace environment
Advanced SQL skills and confidence working with large-scale datasets
Experience using Python for analytical work, modelling, and automation
Hands-on experience with cloud data platforms such as BigQuery, Databricks, or AWS
Proficiency with BI tools such as Tableau or similar for building impactful dashboards
Strong understanding of business metrics including conversion, retention, and customer lifetime value
Ability to translate ambiguous problems into clear analytical approaches
Confident communicator who can influence stakeholders and challenge thinking constructively




What They Offer

Competitive salary and benefits package
Opportunity to work on high-impact projects influencing product and commercial strategy
Collaborative, cross-functional working environment
Clear scope for career progression within a data-driven organisation
Exposure to large-scale data and modern data tooling




How to Apply

If you are interested in this Senior Data Analyst opportunity, please apply with your CV to be considered.

Title: Digital (B2C) Analyst
HTML:
DIGITAL (B2C) ANALYST

Turn numbers into momentum.


Lijnden | B2C | 40 hours | Full-time

At Just Brands, we build menswear brands with character. PME Legend, Cast Iron and Vanguard each have their own voice, their own audience and their own place in the market. In B2C, growth comes from thousands of daily decisions across retail, ecommerce, marketing, CRM, marketplaces and the digital experience. The difference between “good” and “great” is clarity: knowing what’s happening, why it’s happening and what to do next.

But what really sets us apart is how we work together.

We’re team first. No ego, no unnecessary layers, no endless talking, no corporate theatre. We back each other, speak up, take ownership and keep pushing for better. We work hard, stay sharp and make sure there’s room to enjoy the ride too.


That’s where you come in.


Why this role matters

This is where insight becomes action. As our Digital (B2C) Analyst, you support data-driven decision-making across all B2C channels: Retail, E-commerce, Digital Marketing & CRM, Site Merchandising, Site Experience, IT & UX and Marketplaces. You collect, analyse and interpret data to deliver clear, actionable insights that improve performance, customer experience and operational efficiency. You are not here to build dashboards that nobody uses.


You are here to help teams make smarter decisions every day, backed by data that is trusted.


What you’ll do

  • Gather and analyze data across B2C channels to spot trends, issues and optimisation opportunities;
  • Build and maintain performance reports and dashboards that track key KPIs across the business;
  • Translate data into clear recommendations for cross-functional teams;
  • Analyze customer behavior to improve journey, engagement and conversion across channels;
  • Support A/B testing and experimentation: design, execution, analysis and learnings;
  • Help improve data quality, governance and consistency across platforms and reporting;
  • Support strategic projects with data-driven insights and structured analysis;
  • Contribute to forecasting and predictive analysis to anticipate customer behaviour and sales trends;
  • Work closely with B2C teams to embed insights into daily decisions.


What success looks like in your first year

  • Stakeholders rely on your reporting and insights because they are clear, consistent and actionable;
  • Dashboards and reports are adopted and used in weekly/monthly rhythms;
  • Your analyses lead to measurable improvements (conversion, engagement, trading performance or efficiency);
  • A/B tests produce learnings that actually change how we work;
  • Data definitions and quality improve, reducing noise and confusion across teams.


What makes this role exciting

  • You work across the full B2C ecosystem: retail, ecommerce, CRM, marketing, marketplaces and site experience;
  • You influence both performance and customer experience, not just one side;
  • You get room to test, learn and improve, with teams that want to act on insights;
  • You help shape how decisions are made as we scale and grow internationally;
  • You work with strong brands and real omnichannel momentum.


You’ll probably love this role if you…

  • enjoy turning messy data into clear direction;
  • like working with many stakeholders and helping them move faster;
  • care about both performance and customer experience;
  • get energy from experimentation and learning what actually works;
  • prefer practical impact over endless analysis.


What you bring

  • Bachelor’s degree in Data Science, Business Analytics, Statistics, Economics, Marketing or a related field;
  • 5+ years of experience in analytics / BI / data analysis, preferably in B2C retail or ecommerce;
  • Strong proficiency with tools such as Google Analytics, SQL, Excel and Power BI or Tableau;
  • Solid understanding of ecommerce metrics, digital marketing analytics and retail performance;
  • Experience working cross-functionally in a fast-paced, data-driven environment;
  • Fluent English (additional languages are a plus);
  • Strong communication skills: you can explain insights to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.


What Just Brands is really like

We’re team first. We keep it direct, make clear decisions and take ownership. No ego. Just sharp collaboration, honest conversations and a team that likes improving what matters.


You’ll Join a Company Where:

  • People help each other out;
  • Ideas and people matter more than job titles;
  • Hard work matters, and so does enjoying the ride;
  • If something can be better, we improve it.


What you get

You step into a role with real influence on B2C decisions across multiple channels. You’ll work closely with teams that need insight to perform and you’ll help build a stronger data-driven culture across the business.


  • End-of-year bonus equal to one month’s gross salary;
  • A healthy and varied lunch every day;
  • Access to our own gym and fitness classes;
  • Parties and gatherings that you’ll talk about for years to come;
  • A tight-knit and super friendly team;
  • Exceptional employee discounts on our clothing.


Ready to turn insight into impact across B2C?


Still reading? Good sign.

If you want to work close to performance, customer experience and real decision-making, and you want your analyses to actually change outcomes, this could be your next step.


Ready to apply?

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Department: Data

Location: Korneuburg, Austria

Description

About the team:

Join our innovative and forward-thinking Technology team as we drive technological and operational advancements across our businesses. Our passionate team leverages cutting-edge technologies and robust data solutions to enhance business performance and shape the future of the re-commerce industry.

About The Role

We’re looking for a data-first, insight-hungry Data Analyst to help us evolve our reporting and analytic capabilities. You’ll start by building on a solid foundation of data, and grow your impact by helping teams solve real world problems with smart, scalable insights.

This is a hands-on role, you’ll shape dashboards, create new data models and be a go-to partner for business stakeholders. You’ll get to play a key role in making data more self-serve, enabling others to explore and act on insights, with your support.

________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Getting Started...


Get to know our BI stack and reporting infrastructure
Meet key commercial and finance stakeholders and shadow existing reporting processes
Review existing dashboards, data sources, and user feedback to identify early wins


Establishing Your Impact…


Build and optimise reports and dashboards in Sigma
Collaborate with marketing, finance, and ops to translate business needs into data outputs
Begin supporting teams with SQL-powered insights and reporting improvements


Driving Excellence…


Own and evolve core dashboards and reporting pipelines
Champion self-service BI through stakeholder training and enablement
Identify data gaps and lead initiatives to improve quality, accessibility, and usability


________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Key Goals & Objectives


Deliver accurate, insightful, and scalable reporting across the business
Improve the quality, speed, and accessibility of our internal data
Support decision-making through analysis and close collaboration with teams
Enable a culture of self-service analytics through training and tools


Key Responsibilities


Design and maintain dashboards in Sigma
Translate business requirements into data solutions, from ad hoc queries to scalable reports
Write robust SQL to support reporting, modelling, and transformation tasks
Act as a connector between business users and the core data team
Train and support colleagues on BI tools and data best practices
Identify inefficiencies in existing reporting and proactively offer improvements
Support experimentation with natural language querying and other accessibility features
Partner especially closely with Finance and Commercial teams to drive meaningful analysis


Skills, Knowledge And Expertise

Essential Skills & Experience:


Solid SQL skills and experience building data models from scratch
Proficiency in BI tools (ideally Sigma, but Power BI, Looker or similar also great)
Confident working across departments to gather requirements and iterate on outputs
Background in Business, Finance, or Data Analyst roles (or similar analytical fields)
Curious, commercial mindset — you want to understand the “why” behind the data


Desirable (Nice to Have):


Exposure to natural language querying tools or approaches
Previous experience improving or designing self-serve analytics environments
Hands-on knowledge of modern data stacks and modelling approaches


Equal Opportunities

At Vintage Trading Limited, we’re committed to creating an inclusive environment where everyone feels heard, respected, and able to bring their authentic self to work. We believe that diversity fuels innovation, creativity, and success.

We welcome applicants from all backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences, and we work hard to ensure equitable opportunities for all. If you're excited about this role but don’t meet every requirement, we still encourage you to apply, your unique skills and experiences might be exactly what we need now or in the future.

If you need any adjustments or accommodations during the hiring process, just let us know and we’ll do our best to support you.

Your personal data will be handled in accordance with our Privacy Notice.

Title: Data Analist / BI Specialist
HTML:
Als Data Analist / BI Specialist zorg jij ervoor dat organisaties hun data omzetten in waardevolle inzichten. Je analyseert complexe datasets, vertaalt deze naar heldere rapportages en dashboards en adviseert stakeholders over datagedreven beslissingen. Met moderne BI-tools zoals Power BI, Tableau of Qlik maak je informatie toegankelijk en begrijpelijk. Daarmee help je onze klanten – zoals de Belastingdienst, Gemeente Den Haag, Centraal Justitieel Incassobureau en VGZ – om hun beleid en processen te verbeteren en toekomstgericht te sturen.


Waarom past deze vacature bij jou?

Je hebt een passie voor data en ziet het als jouw missie om cijfers en informatie te vertalen naar verhalen die impact maken. Je bent analytisch sterk, communicatief vaardig en kunt schakelen tussen business en techniek. Je vindt het leuk om samen te werken met collega’s en stakeholders en voelt je thuis in een omgeving waar data centraal staat.


Wat kan je van ons verwachten?

Bij CIMSOLUTIONS krijg je de kans om te werken aan uitdagende en innovatieve data- en BI-projecten bij toonaangevende organisaties. Wij investeren in jouw ontwikkeling en bieden naast een inspirerende werkomgeving:

  • Een vast dienstverband voor onbepaalde tijd, een max. salaris van € 6.000, bonusregeling, leaseauto, pensioenregeling en maandelijkse onkostenvergoeding;
  • Opdrachtkeuzevrijheid: Jij bepaalt in overleg waar je aan werkt, met de begeleiding van een personal coach;
  • Per jaar € 5.000,- opleidingsbudget en daarnaast ook nog eens 5-10 dagen studietijd;
  • Kennissessies met vakgenoten en inhoudelijke events;
  • Minimaal 25 vakantiedagen, met de mogelijkheid om extra dagen op te bouwen of te verkopen;
  • Sociale events zoals sportdagen, weekend weg en gezellige borrels;
  • Een vestiging bij jou in de buurt.


Persoonlijke ontwikkeling

Bij CIMSOLUTIONS geloven we dat leren de sleutel is tot succes. Learn, create and make it work is niet alleen onze slogan, maar zit in ons DNA. Daarom investeren we continu in jouw groei. Je krijgt de ruimte om jezelf te ontwikkelen tot bijvoorbeeld Senior Data Analist, BI Architect of Data Platform Specialist. Je wordt begeleid door ervaren collega’s, krijgt toegang tot kennisplatforms en blijft altijd scherp op de nieuwste ontwikkelingen binnen jouw vakgebied.


CIMSOLUTIONS heeft een actief diversiteitsbeleid en streeft naar een evenwichtige verdeling van professionals naar onder andere leeftijd, gender, etnische achtergrond en cultuur, arbeidsvermogen, kennis en competenties. Daarbij benadrukken wij dat gelijke kansen voor iedereen een belangrijk uitgangspunt zijn in onze selectie.


Wat breng jij mee?

  • Afgeronde hbo- of wo-opleiding in Bedrijfskunde, Econometrie, Data Science, Business Intelligence of vergelijkbaar;
  • Minimaal 4 jaar ervaring als Data Analist of BI Specialist;
  • Ervaring met BI-tools zoals Power BI, Tableau of Qlik;
  • Sterke kennis van SQL en ervaring met het analyseren van grote datasets;
  • Affiniteit met datavisualisatie, datakwaliteit en rapportage;
  • AI-affiniteit is een pré;
  • Goede beheersing van de Nederlandse en Engelse taal.


Waarom CIMSOLUTIONS?

  • 15 keer Top Employer!
  • Uitstekend salaris;
  • Vrije keuze leaseauto;
  • € 5000,- opleidingsbudget;
  • Aantrekkelijke bonussen;
  • Veel sociale evenementen;
  • Uitdagende projecten;
  • Gevarieerde opdrachten;
  • Gerenommeerde klanten.


Heb je interesse?

Wij vinden het leuk om op ons hoofdkantoor of één van onze lokale vestigingen of online kennis te maken. Solliciteer via onderstaande button of neem voor meer informatie contact op met ons recruitment team via:

  • Mail: recruitment@cimsolutions.nl;
  • Telefoon: 0499-366 000;
